<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Strategy; interface SubcommandStrategyInterface { /** * Process arguments for given subcommand. * * @param array $arguments * @return array */ public function processArguments(array $arguments): array; }
